keywords: conditional revision allowed content policy not owner already responded rejection payload discriminating FLOW-12 FLOW-19
ironRules: revision_allowed:true ONLY for content_policy rejection reason
revision_allowed:false for not_owner and already_responded — revision would be rejected again
revision_allowed is a discriminating field in rejection event payload — drives UX decision
not_owner revision attempt consumes another idempotency slot then fails again — SILENT_FAILURE
